channel.title: Maine Workers' Compensation Board — Current Rules
channel.description: Single paragraph naming the current effective rule set and linking its PDF, not a list; monitored by full-page fingerprint. Proposed-rulemaking notices are only distributed via the Board's email listserv, which has no web/RSS equivalent.

item.title: Page updated: Maine Workers' Compensation Board — Current Rules
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + State Average Weekly Wage, COLA, & Max Comp Rate Removed: - Max Comp Rate
